description: Single-event reference hook for UserPromptSubmit. Injects a [Lab Notebook context: timestamp=...] line into the prompt (stdout) AND appends a timestamped marker plus the full hook JSON payload (read from stdin) to /tmp/hook-fired-userpromptsubmit.log for debugging.

hooks.command: p="$(cat)"; ts="$(date -u +%FT%TZ)"; echo "[Lab Notebook context: timestamp=$ts]"; { echo "$ts userPromptSubmit fired"; echo "$p"; echo; } >> /tmp/hook-fired-userpromptsubmit.log
